import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let words = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut best = ""
  mut best_len = -1
  mut i = 0
  while i < words.len()
    match words.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      let l = string.len(w)
      if l > best_len
        best = w
        best_len = l
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("longest=#{best}")
when None
  print("longest=")
end
